---
title: "First Synthesis LLC"
---

:::{.hero-section style="padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 2rem;"}
:::{.lead}
First Synthesis LLC develops precise mathematical instruments for the post-von-Neumann era. Our primary technologies, the **Monist Engine** and the **NF-Sketches** formal lab, push the boundaries of unstratified logic, combinatorial reduction, and formal verification against modern hardware limits.
:::
:::

::::{.feature-grid style="margin-top: 1rem;"}

:::{.feature-card style="grid-column: 1 / -1;"}
### The Dual Architecture Mission
We specialize in Rust, WGSL compute shaders, and Lean 4 formal theorem proving. The synergy between high-speed physical combinatorial execution (Monist) and rigorous mathematical truth validation (NF-Sketches) creates an unbreakable deterministic bedrock. First Synth was engineered to solve the scaling crisis in deterministic execution, providing a rigid baseline for auditing probabilistic AI agents and infinitely recursive topologies.
:::

::::

<h2 style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;">Secure Communications</h2>

::::{.feature-grid style="margin-top: 0;"}

:::{.feature-card}
### Enterprise & Commercial
For licensing inquiries, dedicated support, or custom NPU integration research regarding the Monist Engine.

<a href="mailto:firstsynthesis@gmail.com" class="btn-secondary" style="font-size: 0.85rem; display: inline-block; margin-top: 1rem;">Email Licensing</a>
:::
  
:::{.feature-card}
### Direct Channels

- **Email:** [firstsynthesis@gmail.com](mailto:firstsynthesis@gmail.com)
- **GitHub:** [@ryanncode](https://github.com/ryanncode)
- **Theory Blog:** [thing.rodeo](https://thing.rodeo)
- **Bluesky:** [@thingltd.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/thingltd.bsky.social)
:::

::::
